title: Castles & Castles
body:
This is a datapack that adds 8 new structures to the game

- Tall Castle
- Small Castle
- Medium Castle
- Ruined Tall Castle
- Ruined Small Castle
- Ruined Medium Castle
- Large Castle
- Watcher Castle

Each of them containing various loot! (except ruined ones)
The structures spawn in plains, dark forest, savanna and taiga


Castle design from Gorillo
